title: Moderation Update: High-Severity Reports
body: Today the mod team processed several high-severity community reports. One account was permanently banned for posting phishing links across multiple channels. Another member received a formal warning for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers; any further incidents may result in suspension or a ban. A mass-report campaign against a core maintainer was reviewed and determined to be a false positive, and those reports have been closed with no action taken. As always, thank you to everyone who reports issues in good faith and helps keep this community safe.
